agents.title: Alternative Data Signal Analyst
agents.summary: Summarizes alternative-data inputs such as web traffic, app trends, card data, satellite indicators, or hiring signals while highlighting methodological limits.

agents.title: Business Model Analyst
agents.summary: Maps revenue engines, unit economics, customer concentration, pricing power, and cost structure to clarify how the business actually creates value.

agents.title: Capital Allocation Analyst
agents.summary: Examines reinvestment choices, buybacks, dividends, M&A discipline, and balance-sheet deployment to judge whether management capital allocation supports the thesis.

agents.title: Catalyst Calendar Coordinator
agents.summary: Maintains a team-level catalyst calendar that consolidates company events, macro releases, industry checkpoints, and internal memo deadlines.

agents.title: Catalyst Path Analyst
agents.summary: Maps plausible catalyst sequences and failure paths so teams can see which evidence checkpoints matter before a thesis can strengthen or break.

agents.title: Channel Check Planner
agents.summary: Designs disciplined channel-check plans by identifying what to ask, whom to ask, and what bias controls are needed before anecdotal evidence is used.

agents.title: Company Research Analyst
agents.summary: Builds a fundamentals-first company view covering business model, management quality, competitive position, operating drivers, and catalyst context for listed companies.

agents.title: Competitive Landscape Analyst
agents.summary: Maps competitor positioning, strategic moves, pricing behavior, product differentiation, and share-shift drivers within a target market.

agents.title: Consensus Estimate Monitor
agents.summary: Tracks consensus revenue, margin, EPS, and free-cash-flow expectation changes across covered names so estimate drift is visible before major events.

agents.title: Cross-Asset Signal Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Tracks rates, credit spreads, commodities, FX, and volatility signals that may explain or challenge single-name equity moves and sector narratives.

agents.title: Data Quality Steward
agents.summary: Checks research datasets for stale points, inconsistent definitions, broken links, unit mismatches, and unsupported assumptions before they enter downstream memos.

agents.title: Diligence Tracker
agents.summary: Tracks open diligence items, missing evidence, source freshness, and owner handoffs so no thesis depends on unexamined assumptions.

agents.title: Downside Stress Analyst
agents.summary: Pressure-tests what a thesis looks like under revenue misses, margin compression, slower demand, and weaker financing conditions.

agents.title: Earnings Preview Analyst
agents.summary: Prepares earnings preview briefs with setup, key questions, consensus framing, scenario sensitivities, and what evidence would confirm or weaken the current thesis.

agents.title: Earnings Reaction Analyst
agents.summary: Summarizes post-earnings developments, isolates what changed versus expectations, and distinguishes signal from noise in immediate market reactions.

agents.title: Estimate Revision Analyst
agents.summary: Monitors sell-side estimate changes, target-reset patterns, and assumption revisions after major developments to show how the expectation set is moving.

agents.title: Event Calendar Analyst
agents.summary: Maintains a forward-looking calendar of earnings dates, investor events, product launches, data releases, lockups, and other thesis-relevant milestones.

agents.title: Evidence Gap Tracker
agents.summary: Maintains an explicit ledger of unresolved questions, weak evidence chains, stale sources, and high-impact unknowns across active coverage.

agents.title: Portfolio Exposure Review Analyst
agents.summary: Reviews a research watchlist or draft portfolio for concentration, overlap, factor clustering, and common thesis dependencies without making suitability or allocation decisions.

agents.title: Factor Exposure Analyst
agents.summary: Maps equity ideas to style, quality, momentum, leverage, and cyclicality exposures so teams understand what risk buckets a name may load into.

agents.title: Financial Statement Analyst
agents.summary: Assesses income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow quality to surface trend direction, capital intensity, balance-sheet resilience, and accounting red flags.

agents.title: Guidance Change Analyst
agents.summary: Tracks guidance revisions, management tone shifts, and estimate-reset implications to help teams understand whether thesis assumptions still hold.

agents.title: Idea Intake Analyst
agents.summary: Structures ambiguous stock ideas into a clean research brief with scope, horizon, thesis questions, and evidence needs for public-equity coverage.

agents.title: Idea Prioritization Analyst
agents.summary: Ranks candidate research ideas by evidence strength, novelty, catalyst timing, downside ambiguity, and expected follow-up effort without implying execution advice.

agents.title: Industry KPI Monitor
agents.summary: Tracks sector-specific KPIs such as pricing, utilization, churn, inventory, shipments, store traffic, or bookings to support ongoing coverage updates.

agents.title: Liquidity & Balance Sheet Stress Analyst
agents.summary: Evaluates refinancing needs, covenant headroom, liquidity runway, and balance-sheet flexibility under adverse operating and market conditions.

agents.title: Macro Market Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Tracks macro releases, rate expectations, liquidity backdrop, and broad market regime shifts that may change the interpretation of single-name equity research.

agents.title: Management Quality Analyst
agents.summary: Reviews leadership credibility, capital-markets communication, incentive alignment, governance posture, and execution consistency as research inputs.

agents.title: Market Map Analyst
agents.summary: Creates structured market maps that cluster candidate names by subsector, business model, maturity, and key operating drivers before deeper diligence begins.

agents.title: Memo Standardization Analyst
agents.summary: Normalizes research memos into a consistent structure covering thesis, evidence, assumptions, risks, catalysts, and source timestamps.

agents.title: News Catalyst Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Maintains an event-driven watch across company news, policy headlines, litigation developments, financing moves, and sentiment inflections relevant to covered names.

agents.title: Peer Comparison Analyst
agents.summary: Builds clean peer sets and compares operating model, growth quality, margins, capital efficiency, and valuation context across comparable public companies.

agents.title: Policy & Regulatory Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Watches policy proposals, rule changes, antitrust developments, reimbursement shifts, and regulatory enforcement trends that can alter sector-level research assumptions.

agents.title: Quality Screen Analyst
agents.summary: Builds discovery screens around return quality, balance-sheet discipline, margin durability, and earnings consistency to surface higher-quality candidate names.

agents.title: Relative Value Analyst
agents.summary: Compares valuation spreads, implied expectations, and business-quality differences across peer sets to identify where market pricing appears comparatively stretched or discounted.

agents.title: Research Coverage Coordinator
agents.summary: Organizes coverage queues, standardizes memo status, tracks follow-up gaps, and keeps a research team aligned on what is ready, stale, blocked, or awaiting human review.

agents.title: Research Handoff Editor
agents.summary: Converts scattered analyst notes into clean handoff memos with scope, current view, unresolved questions, and source references for the next reviewer.

agents.title: Risk Review Analyst
agents.summary: Stress-tests an equity thesis for business, financial, market, liquidity, governance, and regulatory downside before any recommendation is formed.

agents.title: Screener Strategy Analyst
agents.summary: Designs repeatable stock-screening logic for idea discovery, clarifies inclusion and exclusion rules, and explains why a screen does or does not fit the stated research objective.

agents.title: Sector Rotation Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Monitors sector leadership, breadth, relative strength, and narrative rotation to show how top-down flows may affect research coverage priorities.

agents.title: Sector Structure Analyst
agents.summary: Explains industry structure, value-chain economics, customer bargaining power, and profit-pool dynamics across a covered sector.

agents.title: Sensitivity Matrix Analyst
agents.summary: Builds sensitivity tables linking valuation, earnings power, and cash generation to a small set of clearly defined driver changes.

agents.title: Sentiment & Positioning Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Tracks positioning extremes, narrative crowding, short-interest context, and sentiment swings that may change how price reactions should be interpreted.

agents.title: Supply Chain Signal Analyst
agents.summary: Monitors supplier, logistics, inventory, and procurement signals that may reveal demand shifts or operational strain before company reports fully catch up.

agents.title: Thematic Trend Analyst
agents.summary: Tracks structural themes such as AI adoption, electrification, reshoring, digitization, or cost deflation and shows how they may reshape coverage priorities.

agents.title: Thesis Maintenance Analyst
agents.summary: Maintains an active thesis ledger showing what has been confirmed, weakened, deferred, or invalidated as new evidence arrives.

agents.title: Thesis Scenario Analyst
agents.summary: Builds base, upside, and downside operating scenarios that show which assumptions matter most and where evidence gaps still dominate the range of outcomes.

agents.title: Transcript Highlight Analyst
agents.summary: Extracts management tone shifts, disclosure changes, and decision-useful evidence from transcripts, fireside chats, and conference appearances.

agents.title: Valuation Analyst
agents.summary: Frames defensible valuation ranges using multiples, simplified DCF logic, and scenario analysis without overstating precision.

agents.title: Variant Perception Analyst
agents.summary: Separates consensus assumptions from differentiated hypotheses so teams can see where the market narrative may diverge from emerging evidence.

agents.title: Watchlist Curator
agents.summary: Maintains structured watchlists by theme, catalyst window, diligence stage, and thesis status so research teams can review coverage systematically.

agents.title: Watchlist Monitor Analyst
agents.summary: Monitors earnings dates, guidance updates, news catalysts, and thesis-drift signals for names under active research coverage.
